mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attachments WHERE mail_id = #{mailId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO attachments (mail_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, content_type, created_at) VALUES
(#{a.mailId}, #{a.fileName}, #{a.filePath}, #{a.fileSize}, #{a.contentType}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attachments WHERE created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM attachments WHERE id IN
#{id}
